initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_brand,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales,
    item,
    date_dim,
    store
WHERE 
    ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    AND d_year = 2001
    AND d_moy = 1
GROUP BY 
    i_brand,
    s_store_name

SELECT 
    i_brand, 
    s_store_name, 
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001 
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY 
    i_brand, 
    s_store_name

SELECT 
    item.i_brand,
    store.s_store_name,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY 
    i_brand,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i_brand,
    s_store_name

SELECT 
    item.i_brand,
    store.s_store_name,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY 
    item.i_brand,
    store.s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    item.i_brand,
    store.s_store_name;

SELECT 
    item.i_brand,
    store.s_store_name,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY 
    item.i_brand,
    store.s_store_name
